message:
fix(bv): propagate BVClient.workDir() errors after normalization change

Update BVClient.workDir() to return (string, error) instead of plain
string, delegating to normalizeTriageDir() which resolves empty paths
to cwd and converts to absolute paths. This is the companion change
to the triage.go normalization fix (da819df):

- workDir() now returns (string, error), calling normalizeTriageDir()
- GetInsights(): extract workDir call with error check before passing
  to GetInsights()
- getTriage(): extract workDir call with error check before cache
  lookup and fetch operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
